## Submission checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I ran `npm install` and `npm test` locally and all checks passed
- [ ] My plugin folder mirrors the shape of `plugins/frontend-developer/`
- [ ] `plugin.json` has all required fields and a kebab-case `name` matching the directory
- [ ] My agent or skill file has the required frontmatter for its format (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I added an entry to `.github/plugin/marketplace.json` in alphabetical order
- [ ] My plugin `README.md` includes an overview and install commands
- [ ] I am happy for this contribution to be licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0
